---
listing:
  id: projects
  contents:
    - projects.yml
  template: _templates/project-card.ejs.md
  sort: "year desc"
  sort-ui: [year, title]
  filter-ui: true
  page-size: 50
  field-types:
    year: number
  field-required: [title, description, concepts]
---

::: {.hero}
# Edgar Duc

AI researcher working on **inverse problems, generative modeling, and reliable machine learning systems**.

[GitHub](https://github.com/XxelTitoxX){.btn .btn-primary}
[CV](cv.html){.btn .btn-secondary}
[Email](mailto:edgar.duc@enpc.fr){.btn .btn-secondary}
:::

## Selected projects

Use the search box to filter by project name, concept, method, library, or year.

::: {#projects}
:::
